title: Figure 2 in Sexual dimorphism in Trapelus ruderatus ruderatus (Sauria: Agamidae) with notes on the natural history
author: Fathinia, Behzad
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 2 (above). Ordination of the individual males and females of Trapelus r. ruderatus on the first two principle components. Note the relative degree of isolation of males and females.
